goals.title: PRD to Goal Tree Planning
goals.description: Plan from PRD into a Goal Tree and FWUs, then schedule execution
goals.success_criteria: CLI can parse intent document and generate valid task JSON with dependencies
goals.verification_method: Run 'openexec plan' on sample intent and validate JSON output structure

goals.title: Auditable Execution Loop
goals.description: Execute FWUs with an auditable loop and live status via SSE
goals.success_criteria: Tasks execute with real-time SSE events and all actions logged to audit trail
goals.verification_method: Subscribe to /events endpoint during execution and verify event stream

goals.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
goals.description: Enforce quality via stack-aware gates (Python/JS/Go/Rust) with structured results
goals.success_criteria: Quality gates run appropriate linters/tests per language and block on failures
goals.verification_method: Trigger gates on multi-language project and verify structured JSON results

goals.title: HITL Approval Webhooks
goals.description: Support approvals via Telegram/WhatsApp webhooks and apply decisions to execution
goals.success_criteria: Webhook endpoints receive approval/reject signals and modify execution state
goals.verification_method: Send test webhook payloads and verify execution state changes

goals.title: Unified CLI Experience
goals.description: Provide a unified CLI (init/plan/start/status/tui) for all operations
goals.success_criteria: All CLI commands work end-to-end with consistent UX
goals.verification_method: Execute full CLI workflow: init -> plan -> start -> status

goals.title: ISO-Compliant Audit Trail
goals.description: Keep an immutable audit trail with automated evidence export for ISO compliance
goals.success_criteria: Evidence export includes audit SQLite, verification logs, model versions, and gate reports
goals.verification_method: Run 'openexec export --evidence' and validate archive contents

stories.title: Project Initialization & Directory Structure
stories.description: As a developer, I want 'openexec init' to create the .openexec directory and initialize required stores so that I have a valid project structure
acceptance_criteria: .openexec directory is created with config.yaml
SQLite audit database is initialized with schema
tasks.json is created with empty array
Command is idempotent (re-running does not corrupt existing data)
stories.verification_script: rm -rf .openexec && openexec init && test -f .openexec/config.yaml && test -f .openexec/audit.db && test -f .openexec/tasks.json

tasks.title: Define init command schema and flags
tasks.description: Define CLI flags (--force, --template) and config.yaml schema
tasks.technical_strategy: Use cobra for CLI framework. Define Config struct with yaml tags. Include version field for schema migrations.

tasks.title: Implement directory creation and config generation
tasks.description: Create .openexec directory and write default config.yaml
tasks.technical_strategy: Use os.MkdirAll with 0755 permissions. Marshal Config struct to YAML. Check os.IsExist for idempotency.

tasks.title: Implement SQLite audit schema initialization
tasks.description: Create audit.db with events, evidence, and runs tables
tasks.technical_strategy: Use database/sql with modernc.org/sqlite for pure Go. Execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS. Add indexes on run_id and timestamp.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for init command
tasks.description: Test init in clean directory, existing directory, and with --force flag
tasks.technical_strategy: Use t.TempDir() for isolated tests. Assert file existence and content. Test error cases for permission denied.
tasks.verification_script: go test ./cmd/openexec/... -cover -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep -q '90'

stories.title: Orchestration Plan CLI
stories.description: As a developer, I want 'openexec plan <intent>' to parse an intent document and generate a JSON task tree so that execution can be scheduled
acceptance_criteria: CLI accepts intent file path or reads from stdin
Outputs JSON summary to stdout
Writes tasks.json to .openexec directory
Supports --ordering (parallel|sequential) and --timeout-mode flags
stories.verification_script: echo '# Test Intent' | openexec plan - && cat .openexec/tasks.json | jq '.stories | length'

tasks.title: Define plan command API contract
tasks.description: Define input schema (intent markdown) and output schema (stories JSON)
tasks.technical_strategy: Create IntentDoc and StoryOutput structs. Use json schema tags. Document supported markdown headers.

tasks.title: Implement intent document parser
tasks.description: Parse markdown intent into structured IntentDoc with goals, features, constraints
tasks.technical_strategy: Use goldmark for markdown parsing. Extract headers via AST walk. Map ## Feature: to feature structs.

tasks.title: Implement story generation from parsed intent
tasks.description: Transform IntentDoc into stories with tasks, dependencies, and verification scripts
tasks.technical_strategy: Create StoryGenerator with configurable templates. Generate task IDs with T-US-XXX-YYY format. Infer depends_on from feature order.

tasks.title: Implement JSON output and file writing
tasks.description: Marshal stories to JSON, print summary to stdout, write to tasks.json
tasks.technical_strategy: Use json.MarshalIndent for readable output. Atomic write via temp file + rename. Print story count and dependency graph summary.
tasks.verification_script: go test ./cmd/openexec/... -run TestPlanOutput -v && go test -cover ./internal/planner/... | grep -q '90'

stories.title: Non-Bypassable Audit Writer
stories.description: As a system operator, I want all execution events written to an immutable audit trail so that I have ISO-compliant evidence
acceptance_criteria: All events are written to audit.db before execution proceeds
Write failures halt execution with explicit error
Events include timestamp, run_id, event_type, and payload
Audit writes cannot be bypassed or disabled
stories.verification_script: go test ./internal/audit/... -v && sqlite3 .openexec/audit.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events'

tasks.title: Define audit event schema and error types
tasks.description: Define Event struct, EventType enum, and AuditWriteError type
tasks.technical_strategy: Use iota for EventType enum. Include EventTypeTaskStart, EventTypeTaskComplete, EventTypeGateResult. Add Unwrap() to AuditWriteError.

tasks.title: Implement synchronous audit writer
tasks.description: Write events to SQLite with transaction per event, return error on failure
tasks.technical_strategy: Use sql.Tx with Commit/Rollback. Set WAL mode for concurrency. Use prepared statements for performance.

tasks.title: Implement execution halt on audit failure
tasks.description: Wrap audit writer in executor middleware that halts on error
tasks.technical_strategy: Create AuditMiddleware wrapping Executor. Check error from WriteEvent before proceeding. Log and return wrapped error.

tasks.title: Add comprehensive unit tests for audit system
tasks.description: Test successful writes, failure scenarios, and concurrent access
tasks.technical_strategy: Use t.Parallel() for concurrency tests. Mock sql.DB for failure injection. Assert event ordering with timestamps.

stories.title: Execution Engine with SSE Events
stories.description: As a developer, I want real-time execution status via SSE so that I can monitor task progress
acceptance_criteria: GET /events endpoint streams SSE with heartbeats every 30s
Events include iteration start/end and phase transitions
Supports --harness, --provider, --model flags
Connection maintains keep-alive and handles client disconnect gracefully

tasks.title: Define SSE event types and message format
tasks.description: Define SSEEvent struct with event type, data payload, and ID
tasks.technical_strategy: Use text/event-stream content type. Include retry field for reconnection. Define EventTypeHeartbeat, EventTypeIterationStart, EventTypePhaseChange.

tasks.title: Implement SSE broadcaster with fan-out
tasks.description: Create broadcaster that manages multiple SSE clients
tasks.technical_strategy: Use sync.Map for client registry. Channel per client with buffer. Remove client on channel close or context cancel.

tasks.title: Implement /events HTTP handler
tasks.description: Create HTTP handler for SSE endpoint with heartbeat ticker
tasks.technical_strategy: Set Cache-Control: no-cache, Connection: keep-alive headers. Use time.Ticker for heartbeats. Flush after each write.

tasks.title: Integrate SSE with execution loop
tasks.description: Emit events at iteration boundaries and phase transitions
tasks.technical_strategy: Inject Broadcaster into Executor via constructor. Emit before and after each task. Include task ID and status in payload.

tasks.title: Add unit and integration tests for SSE
tasks.description: Test event streaming, client disconnect, and reconnection
tasks.technical_strategy: Use httptest.NewServer for integration tests. Test concurrent clients. Verify heartbeat timing with time.Sleep.

stories.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
stories.description: As a developer, I want quality gates that run appropriate checks per language so that code quality is enforced
acceptance_criteria: Detects project language(s) from file extensions and config files
Runs appropriate linters: Python (black, mypy), JS (eslint), Go (golangci-lint), Rust (clippy)
Returns structured JSON results with pass/fail and details
Gate failures halt execution pipeline

tasks.title: Define quality gate interface and result schema
tasks.description: Define Gate interface and GateResult struct with structured output
tasks.technical_strategy: Use interface{ Run(ctx, path) (GateResult, error) }. Include Duration, Output, and Errors fields in GateResult.

tasks.title: Implement language detection
tasks.description: Detect languages from file extensions and config files (go.mod, package.json, etc.)
tasks.technical_strategy: Walk directory with filepath.WalkDir. Check for marker files first, then count extensions. Return []Language sorted by file count.

tasks.title: Implement Go quality gate
tasks.description: Run go fmt, go vet, and golangci-lint with structured output
tasks.technical_strategy: Use exec.CommandContext with timeout. Parse golangci-lint JSON output. Map issues to GateResult.Errors.

tasks.title: Implement Python quality gate
tasks.description: Run black --check, flake8, and mypy with structured output
tasks.technical_strategy: Check tool availability with exec.LookPath. Parse flake8 output line by line. Use mypy --output=json for structured errors.

tasks.title: Implement JavaScript/TypeScript quality gate
tasks.description: Run eslint and tsc with structured output
tasks.technical_strategy: Use eslint --format=json. Parse tsc output for TS errors. Handle both npm and yarn projects.

tasks.title: Implement gate orchestrator with failure handling
tasks.description: Run all applicable gates and aggregate results, halt on failure
tasks.technical_strategy: Run gates concurrently with errgroup. Collect all results before halting. Return aggregate GateReport with overall status.
tasks.verification_script: go test ./internal/gates/... -run TestOrchestrator -v && go test ./internal/gates/... -cover | grep -q '90'

stories.title: Telegram Webhook Integration
stories.description: As an operator, I want to approve/reject tasks via Telegram so that I can manage execution remotely
acceptance_criteria: POST /webhook/telegram validates secret token
Parses approve/reject/pause commands from message text
Updates execution state via internal API
Sends confirmation message back to user
stories.verification_script: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/webhook/telegram -H 'X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: test' -d '{"message":{"text":"/approve T-001"}}' | grep -q 'approved'

tasks.title: Define Telegram webhook schema and commands
tasks.description: Define TelegramUpdate struct and supported commands (approve, reject, pause, status)
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Telegram Bot API types. Define CommandType enum. Include regex patterns for command parsing.

tasks.title: Implement webhook authentication
tasks.description: Validate X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header
tasks.technical_strategy: Use constant-time comparison with subtle.ConstantTimeCompare. Return 401 on mismatch. Log failed attempts.

tasks.title: Implement command parser and executor
tasks.description: Parse command from message text and execute against execution API
tasks.technical_strategy: Use regexp.MustCompile for command patterns. Inject ExecutionService interface. Return user-friendly error messages.

tasks.title: Implement confirmation message sender
tasks.description: Send confirmation messages back to Telegram chat
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Telegram sendMessage API. Include task ID and new status. Handle rate limiting with retry.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for Telegram webhook
tasks.description: Test full webhook flow with mock Telegram API
tasks.technical_strategy: Use httptest.NewServer for mock Telegram. Test approve/reject/pause commands. Verify state changes in mock execution service.

stories.title: WhatsApp/Twilio Webhook Integration
stories.description: As an operator, I want to approve/reject tasks via WhatsApp so that I have an alternative approval channel
acceptance_criteria: POST /webhook/whatsapp validates Twilio signature
Parses approve/reject commands from message body
Updates execution state via internal API
Sends TwiML response for confirmation
stories.verification_script: curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/webhook/whatsapp -H 'X-Twilio-Signature: valid' -d 'Body=approve T-001' | grep -q 'Message'

tasks.title: Define WhatsApp webhook schema and TwiML response
tasks.description: Define TwilioWebhook struct and TwiML response format
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse application/x-www-form-urlencoded body. Define TwiML Message struct with XML tags. Include From and Body fields.

tasks.title: Implement Twilio signature validation
tasks.description: Validate X-Twilio-Signature using auth token and request URL
tasks.technical_strategy: Use crypto/hmac with sha1. Concatenate URL and sorted params. Base64 encode result and compare.

tasks.title: Implement command parser and TwiML response
tasks.description: Parse command from Body field and return TwiML confirmation
tasks.technical_strategy: Reuse command parsing logic from Telegram. Return application/xml content type. Include task status in Message body.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for WhatsApp webhook
tasks.description: Test full webhook flow with mock Twilio signatures
tasks.technical_strategy: Generate valid signatures in tests. Test approve/reject commands. Verify TwiML response format.

stories.title: CLI Start Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want 'openexec start' to launch execution with configurable flags so that I can run tasks
acceptance_criteria: Reads tasks.json from .openexec directory
Supports --harness (docker|local), --provider (anthropic|openai), --model flags
Starts execution and prints run ID
Respects task dependencies and ordering
stories.verification_script: openexec start --harness local --provider anthropic --model claude-3 | grep -q 'run-'

tasks.title: Define start command flags and validation
tasks.description: Define --harness, --provider, --model flags with validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Use cobra flags with default values. Validate provider/model combinations. Load from config.yaml as fallback.

tasks.title: Implement task loader and dependency resolver
tasks.description: Load tasks.json and build execution DAG from dependencies
tasks.technical_strategy: Use topological sort for DAG. Detect cycles and report error. Group independent tasks for parallel execution.

tasks.title: Implement execution launcher
tasks.description: Start execution loop with configured harness and provider
tasks.technical_strategy: Use factory pattern for harness/provider selection. Generate UUID for run ID. Write run start to audit.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for start command
tasks.description: Test flag parsing, validation, and execution startup
tasks.technical_strategy: Mock executor interface. Test invalid flag combinations. Verify audit entries for run start.

stories.title: CLI Status Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want 'openexec status' to show real-time execution status so that I can monitor progress
acceptance_criteria: Subscribes to SSE /events endpoint
Prints concise status updates to terminal
Shows task progress, current phase, and any errors
Handles connection drops and reconnects

tasks.title: Define status output format
tasks.description: Define terminal output format for status updates
tasks.technical_strategy: Use ANSI colors for status (green=done, yellow=running, red=failed). Show progress bar for overall completion. Include ETA based on task durations.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client with reconnection
tasks.description: Create SSE client that handles connection drops and reconnects
tasks.technical_strategy: Use bufio.Scanner for SSE parsing. Implement exponential backoff for reconnection. Use Last-Event-ID header for resume.

tasks.title: Implement status renderer
tasks.description: Render SSE events to terminal with formatting
tasks.technical_strategy: Use term package for cursor control. Clear and redraw on each event. Handle terminal resize with SIGWINCH.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for status command
tasks.description: Test SSE parsing, reconnection, and rendering
tasks.technical_strategy: Use mock SSE server. Test event parsing for all types. Verify output formatting.

stories.title: Live TUI Dashboard
stories.description: As a developer, I want 'openexec tui' to provide a real-time terminal dashboard so that I can monitor all workers and tasks
acceptance_criteria: Shows all workers with status (idle, running, error)
Displays pending tasks queue
Shows live logs from current task
Updates in real-time via SSE
Keyboard navigation (j/k scroll, q quit, enter select)

tasks.title: Define TUI layout and component structure
tasks.description: Design TUI layout with workers panel, tasks panel, and logs panel
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Bubbletea for TUI framework. Define Model struct with focused panel state. Use Lipgloss for styling.

tasks.title: Implement workers panel
tasks.description: Display worker list with status indicators and current task
tasks.technical_strategy: Use table component from Bubbles. Update on worker SSE events. Show spinner for running workers.

tasks.title: Implement tasks queue panel
tasks.description: Display pending tasks with dependencies and priority
tasks.technical_strategy: Use list component from Bubbles. Show dependency count. Highlight blocked vs ready tasks.

tasks.title: Implement live logs panel
tasks.description: Show scrollable log output from current task
tasks.technical_strategy: Use viewport component from Bubbles. Buffer last 1000 lines. Auto-scroll with toggle.

tasks.title: Implement keyboard navigation
tasks.description: Add keyboard shortcuts for panel focus, scrolling, and actions
tasks.technical_strategy: Handle KeyMsg in Update. Tab cycles panels. j/k scroll in focused panel. q quits.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for TUI components
tasks.description: Test all panels, navigation, and SSE integration
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Bubbletea test helpers. Send mock key events. Verify View() output.

stories.title: ISO Evidence Export
stories.description: As an auditor, I want 'openexec export --evidence' to generate a complete evidence archive so that I can verify compliance
acceptance_criteria: Exports full audit trail from SQLite
Includes all verification evidence (test results, gate reports)
Records model versions used for each task
Includes static gate reports
Optional cryptographic signing of archive
stories.verification_script: openexec export --evidence --output evidence.tar.gz && tar -tzf evidence.tar.gz | grep -q 'audit.db'

tasks.title: Define evidence archive structure
tasks.description: Define directory structure and manifest format for evidence archive
tasks.technical_strategy: Create manifest.json with schema version, export timestamp, and file checksums. Organize by run_id/task_id hierarchy.

tasks.title: Implement audit trail exporter
tasks.description: Export audit.db to archive with integrity verification
tasks.technical_strategy: Use SQLite backup API for consistent copy. Calculate SHA256 of database. Include in manifest.

tasks.title: Implement evidence collector
tasks.description: Collect verification evidence (test outputs, gate results) by run
tasks.technical_strategy: Query audit.db for evidence events. Copy referenced files to archive. Verify file existence.

tasks.title: Implement model version recorder
tasks.description: Extract and record model versions used for each task
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse model field from audit events. Create models.json with task_id to model mapping. Include provider info.

tasks.title: Implement optional cryptographic signing
tasks.description: Sign manifest with Ed25519 key for tamper detection
tasks.technical_strategy: Use crypto/ed25519 for signing. Store signature in manifest.sig. Support --sign and --key flags.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for export command
tasks.description: Test archive generation, content verification, and signing
tasks.technical_strategy: Create test fixtures with sample audit data. Verify archive contents. Test signature verification.

stories.title: Story-Level Validation Review
stories.description: As a reviewer, I want validation to occur at story level so that I can verify integrated features
acceptance_criteria: Task-level verification is autonomous and evidence-based
Story completion triggers validation checkpoint
Validation includes integrated feature testing
Evidence is logged for both verification and validation
Failed validation blocks dependent stories
stories.verification_script: go test ./internal/validation/... -v && sqlite3 .openexec/audit.db 'SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_type LIKE "validation%"'

tasks.title: Define verification vs validation event types
tasks.description: Define distinct event types for task verification and story validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Add EventTypeTaskVerified, EventTypeStoryValidated, EventTypeStoryRejected. Include evidence_path in payload.

tasks.title: Implement autonomous task verification
tasks.description: Run verification_script for each task and log evidence
tasks.technical_strategy: Execute script with timeout. Capture stdout/stderr to evidence file. Log EventTypeTaskVerified with pass/fail.

tasks.title: Implement story completion detector
tasks.description: Detect when all tasks in a story are verified
tasks.technical_strategy: Query audit.db for task events by story. Check all tasks have EventTypeTaskVerified. Emit StoryReadyForValidation event.

tasks.title: Implement story validation checkpoint
tasks.description: Run integrated validation and request reviewer approval
tasks.technical_strategy: Execute story verification_script. Emit validation request via webhook. Wait for approve/reject response.

tasks.title: Implement dependency blocking on validation failure
tasks.description: Block dependent stories when validation fails
tasks.technical_strategy: Check story validation status before starting dependent stories. Log blocked reason in audit. Notify via SSE.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for validation system
tasks.description: Test verification, validation, and blocking scenarios
tasks.technical_strategy: Create test stories with dependencies. Mock verification scripts. Verify audit events and blocking behavior.

stories.title: Web Dashboard with SSE
stories.description: As an operator, I want a web dashboard to monitor projects and execution so that I have visual observability
acceptance_criteria: Next.js dashboard shows projects list
Displays phases and worker status
Shows recent audit events in real-time
Configurable via .env.local for backend endpoints
Responsive design for desktop and mobile
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-web && npm run build && npm run test

tasks.title: Define dashboard API contract and types
tasks.description: Define TypeScript types for API responses and SSE events
tasks.technical_strategy: Create types in src/types/. Match Go struct definitions. Use zod for runtime validation.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client hook
tasks.description: Create React hook for SSE subscription with reconnection
tasks.technical_strategy: Use EventSource API. Handle onmessage, onerror, onopen. Implement reconnection with exponential backoff.

tasks.title: Implement projects list page
tasks.description: Create page showing all projects with status summary
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Next.js App Router. Fetch projects from API. Show card for each with progress indicator.

tasks.title: Implement project detail page
tasks.description: Create page showing phases, workers, and live events for a project
tasks.technical_strategy: Use dynamic route /projects/[id]. Subscribe to SSE for updates. Show worker cards and event log.

tasks.title: Implement audit events component
tasks.description: Create real-time audit event list with filtering
tasks.technical_strategy: Use virtualized list for performance. Filter by event type and severity. Show timestamp and details.

tasks.title: Implement environment configuration
tasks.description: Support .env.local configuration for backend endpoints
tasks.technical_strategy: Use NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var. Provide default for local dev. Document in README.

tasks.title: Add unit and E2E tests for dashboard
tasks.description: Test all components and user flows
tasks.technical_strategy: Use React Testing Library for unit tests. Use Playwright for E2E. Mock SSE in tests.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-web && npm run test && npm run test:e2e

stories.title: Goal Validation E2E Tests
stories.description: As a project owner, I want E2E tests to verify primary goals so that I have confidence in system correctness
acceptance_criteria: E2E test covers full workflow: init -> plan -> start -> status
Verifies audit trail contains expected events
Verifies quality gates run and report results
Verifies SSE events are received
Tests run in CI environment

tasks.title: Define E2E test fixtures
tasks.description: Create sample intent document and expected outputs for E2E tests
tasks.technical_strategy: Create testdata/ directory. Include minimal intent.md. Define expected story count and task IDs.

tasks.title: Implement init -> plan -> start workflow test
tasks.description: Test full CLI workflow from project init to execution start
tasks.technical_strategy: Use t.TempDir() for isolated project. Execute CLI commands via exec.Command. Verify file outputs.

tasks.title: Implement audit trail verification test
tasks.description: Verify audit.db contains expected events after execution
tasks.technical_strategy: Query audit.db after workflow. Assert EventTypeRunStart, EventTypeTaskStart events exist. Verify timestamps are sequential.

tasks.title: Implement quality gates E2E test
tasks.description: Verify quality gates run and produce structured results
tasks.technical_strategy: Create test project with Go code. Run gates command. Parse JSON output and verify structure.

tasks.title: Implement SSE E2E test
tasks.description: Verify SSE events are received during execution
tasks.technical_strategy: Start execution in background. Connect to /events. Assert heartbeat and task events received within timeout.

tasks.title: Configure CI for E2E tests
tasks.description: Add E2E tests to CI pipeline with proper setup
tasks.technical_strategy: Add e2e job to GitHub Actions. Install Go and dependencies. Run with -tags=e2e. Upload test artifacts on failure.
